Modifications.Value: Blasts enemy units around a target enemy unit with a wave of damaging frost that slows movement and attack rate. |n|n|cffffcc00Level 1|r - 100 target damage, 50 nova damage. |n|cffffcc00Level 2|r - 100 target damage, 100 nova damage. |n|cffffcc00Level 3|r - 100 target damage, 150 nova damage. |n|cffffcc00Level 4|r - 100 target damage, 200 nova damage. |n|cffffcc00Level 5|r - 100 target damage, 250 nova damage.
Blasts enemy units with a wave of frost that deals <ZBFN,DataB1> damage to the target, and <ZBFN,DataA1> nova damage. Cold damage slows units' movement and attack rate for <ZBFN,Dur1> seconds.
